headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Phillips 66 (PSX) Extending Its Western Gateway Pipeline Open Season
summary: Earlier in March, Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan extended the second open season for the proposed Western Gateway refined products pipeline, giving shippers until April 15 to evaluate updated transportation agreements and remaining capacity into the Los Angeles market via Kinder Morgan’s SFPP Watson–Colton line. This extension, following prior strong shipper interest, highlights how Phillips 66 is working to secure long-term transportation commitments that could support more predictable...
